generic_rules: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Annexes are scoped to their owning component declaration.
Use exact names from the model index when referencing identifiers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` or `guarantee "label": expression;` for assertions.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants.
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
Avoid using identifiers copied from examples or inventing new ports/components.
